'''dagungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hield|hield]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-g-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hield|hield]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dagungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dægingith|dægingith]] || [[word:dægingij|dægingij]] || [[word:dægingish|dægingish]] || [[word:dægingi|dægingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dagugunguth|dagugunguth]] || [[word:dagugunguj|dagugunguj]] || [[word:dagugungush|dagugungush]] || [[word:dagugungu|dagugungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dagunguth|dagunguth]] || [[word:dagunguj|dagunguj]] || [[word:dagungush|dagungush]] || [[word:dagungu|dagungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dagufnguth|dagufnguth]] || [[word:dagufnguj|dagufnguj]] || [[word:dagufngush|dagufngush]] || [[word:dagufnguf|dagufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dagunguthu|dagunguthu]] || [[word:dagunguju|dagunguju]] || [[word:dagungushu|dagungushu]] || [[word:dagunguku|dagunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dagunguth|dagunguth]] || [[word:dagunguj|dagunguj]] || [[word:dagungush|dagungush]] || [[word:dagungu|dagungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dagunguthul|dagunguthul]] || [[word:dagungujul|dagungujul]] || [[word:dagungushul|dagungushul]] || [[word:dagungukul|dagungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dagunguthuthu|dagunguthuthu]] || [[word:dagungujuju|dagungujuju]] || [[word:dagungushushu|dagungushushu]] || [[word:dagunguku|dagunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dagunguthun|dagunguthun]] || [[word:dagungujun|dagungujun]] || [[word:dagungushun|dagungushun]] || [[word:dagungukun|dagungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dagunguthuoro|dagunguthuoro]] || [[word:dagungujuoro|dagungujuoro]] || [[word:dagungushuoro|dagungushuoro]] || [[word:dagungukuoro|dagungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
